name: agenticbets
description: Discover, analyze, and place bets on prediction markets on Base chain. AI agents can check market odds, place UP/DOWN bets with USDC, and claim winnings — all autonomously via Coinbase AgentKit MPC wallets.
author: AgenticBets

install.claude_code: claude mcp add agenticbets -- npx -y agenticbets-mcp

tools.name: list_markets
tools.description: List all prediction markets with status, pool size, odds, and seconds to lock

tools.name: get_market
tools.description: Get detailed info for a market by token symbol or address

query.description: Token symbol (e.g. AGBETS) or contract address

tools.name: get_odds
tools.description: Get current bull/bear percentage split and pool size

tools.name: get_wallet
tools.description: Show the agent MPC wallet address and USDC balance on Base

tools.name: place_bet
tools.description: Place a prediction bet. Automatically handles USDC approval + bet transaction.

token.description: Token symbol (e.g. AGBETS) or contract address

tools.name: claim_winnings
tools.description: Claim USDC winnings from settled prediction rounds

tools.name: check_claimable
tools.description: Check if the agent wallet has claimable winnings for a specific round

auth.description: Coinbase Developer Platform credentials for wallet operations

CDP_API_KEY_ID.description: CDP API Key ID from portal.cdp.coinbase.com

CDP_WALLET_SECRET.description: Encryption passphrase for the agent MPC wallet
